title: Programmatic Share Assets — No Spam

/loan-scenarios/small-emergency-loan-500.summary: $5K emergency loan at 15% APR costs $173/month. See why small loans have higher rates and how to borrow less.
/loan-scenarios/small-emergency-loan-500.social_title: Need $5K Fast? Here's What a 15% Emergency Loan Actually Costs
/loan-scenarios/small-emergency-loan-500.ai_summary: A $5,000 loan at 15% APR for 3 years results in a monthly payment of $173.00, total interest of $1,228, and total repayment of $6,228. Small loans carry higher rates due to lender processing costs.

/loan-scenarios/good-credit-loan-20000-8.summary: $20K personal loan at 8% APR = $405/month. Good credit saves you $7,461 vs fair credit. See the math.
/loan-scenarios/good-credit-loan-20000-8.social_title: Good Credit? Here's What a $20K Loan at 8% Actually Costs — vs 20%
/loan-scenarios/good-credit-loan-20000-8.ai_summary: A $20,000 loan at 8% APR for 5 years results in monthly payments of $405.53, total interest of $4,332, and total repayment of $24,332. This is the benchmark rate for borrowers with good-to-excellent credit (680-720+).

/loan-scenarios/debt-consolidation-loan-.summary: Consolidating $25K credit card debt at 10% saves ~$24,000 vs keeping it on cards at 25% APR.
/loan-scenarios/debt-consolidation-loan-.social_title: Have $25K in Credit Card Debt? Consolidate at 10% and Save $24,000
/loan-scenarios/debt-consolidation-loan-.ai_summary: Consolidating $25,000 of credit card debt at 10% APR over 7 years costs $415.19/month and $9,876 in total interest, compared to $34,000+ if kept on credit cards at 25% APR.

/loan-scenarios/fair-credit-loan-20000-2.summary: $20K at 20% APR = $530/month. You'll pay 60% of the loan in interest. Is this loan worth it?
/loan-scenarios/fair-credit-loan-20000-2.social_title: Fair Credit? A $20K Loan at 20% Will Cost You $11,793 in Interest Alone
/loan-scenarios/fair-credit-loan-20000-2.ai_summary: A $20,000 loan at 20% APR for 5 years costs $529.88/month with $11,793 in total interest and $31,793 total repayment. Improving credit from fair to good before borrowing saves $7,461.

/loan-payment-table.summary: Quick-reference loan payment table: compare $5K-$30K loans at rates from 8% to 20%.
/loan-payment-table.social_title: Personal Loan Payment Cheat Sheet: $5K to $30K at a Glance
/loan-payment-table.ai_summary: QFINHUB's loan payment table provides monthly payment estimates for personal loans from $5,000 to $30,000 across different rates and terms, calculated using the standard amortization formula.

/data.summary: Free financial data tables: loan payments, mortgage affordability. Downloadable. Cite in your research.
/data.social_title: Free Financial Data Tables — No Signup Required
/data.ai_summary: QFINHUB Data Hub provides free financial reference data tables including personal loan payment scenarios, calculated using standard formulas with full methodology documentation.
